title: New sponsor for Evergreens
description: RUGBY NEWS - The Pacaltsdorp rugby club...
bodyText:
RUGBY NEWS - The Pacaltsdorp rugby club Evergreens will be sponsored by the specialist funeral insurance provider, Multisure Corporation, for the 2025 season.


> At the announcement on Friday 14 February, Multisure CEO Denton Goodford said the company has great pleasure in entering into a partnership with a club that is well known and established in the Southern Cape region.


He expressed the hope that the sponsorship will contribute towards the upliftment of the communities in which the club operates.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
